signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Stay as Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed, No Immediate Departure Despite May Term End** | **N
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Stay as Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed, No Immediate Departure Despite May Term End** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1]

Federal Reserve Chair **Jerome Powell** stated he will remain in his role until a successor is Senate-confirmed, addressing uncertainty around his May 2026 term expiration[1]. President Trump nominated former Fed Governor **Kevin Warsh** as successor

signals.headline: Lakers Take 2-0 Lead Over Rockets in First-Round Playoffs After 101-94 Game 2 Win | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Lakers Take 2-0 Lead Over Rockets in First-Round Playoffs After 101-94 Game 2 Win | YES | HIGH confidence**  
LeBron James scored 28 points, 8 rebounds, and 7 assists in 39 minutes, including a reverse dunk, while Rui Hachimura played 43 minutes with 13 points in the victory, giving the Lakers a commanding series lead heading to Houston for Game 3 on April 24.[4]
